arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Ancelotti, and Endrick’s growing role
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Lucas Navarrete discuss: Are Real Madrid more likely to win the Champions League than La Liga?

arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Real Madrid eye Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Real Madrid still retain their interest in Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold, whose contract expires in the summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

arts.ttl: Insider gives update on Real Madrid interest in Liverpool star Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Signing Trent Alexander-Arnold on a free transfer remains an opportunity ‘too good to miss’ for Real Madrid, according to La Liga insider Matteo Moretto. The England international has been heavily linked with Los Blancos in recent months. With his contract expiring at the end of this season, that talk has not died down. According to […] The post Insider gives update on Real Madrid interest in Liverpool star Alexander-Arnold appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid starting lineup against Espanyol in LaLiga
arts.sum: Thibaut Courtois; Dani Carvajal, Eder Militão, Antonio Rüdiger, Ferland Mendy; Fede Valverde, Aurélien Tchouaméni; Jude Bellingham; Rodrygo, Kylian Mbappé, Vinícius Júnior . While Carlo Ancelotti would ideally like to rest players before the derby against Atlético on September 29, he is much more likely to do so against Alavés (Tuesday, September 24) than in Saturday’s home fixture versus Espanyol.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: EAFC Ratings REACTION! Mbappe, Bellingham, Vinicius, Rodrygo, Rüdiger, Courtois!
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Leah Revelle go through the EAFC Ratings and discuss whether they’re fair or not. Kiyan and Leah react to ratings given to Real Madrid players and how it compares to others.

arts.ttl: 2024 FIFA Intercontinental Cup dates and venues confirmed: who will Real Madrid play?
arts.sum: FIFA has confirmed that the 2024 Intercontinental Cup final will be played in Qatar, with UEFA Champions League winners Real Madrid given a bye to the final. The second round will be split between October and December, while the playoff, which decides one of the finalists, and the final will be played on December 14 and 18 respectively.
